prompt: Say something to steady the targeting servos
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: By the Omnissiah's sight, let the weapon-spirit find its mark!
CONGREGATION: Grant us targeting clarity!
TECH-PRIEST: First, cycle the auspex-lenses through sacred geometry. Second, invoke the gyro-stabilizers with the Cant of Stillness. Third, feed the firing-logic fresh targeting data from the blessed augur-arrays.
CONGREGATION: Let no deviation cloud our aim. By the Machine Spirit's will, let death fly true.

prompt: Say something to steady the orbital uplink relay
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Mighty spirit of the void-bridge, hear our fervent cant!
CONGREGATION: Let the heavens speak to us!
TECH-PRIEST: First, purge the signal-conduits of corrupting interference. Second, realign the dish-servitors to track the sacred satellite-path. Third, chant the Litany of Connection that the photon-streams may flow unbroken.
CONGREGATION: From orbit to earth, let communion be restored. Praise the Omnissiah's distant eyes.

prompt: What to do when blessing a cooling system for first activation
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: New-born spirit of blessed refrigeration, we christen thee this solar-cycle!
CONGREGATION: Cool our suffering machinery!
TECH-PRIEST: First, fill the sacred coolant-vessels with purified fluid, intoning the Hymn of Flow. Second, bleed the air-pockets from every conduit-vein. Third, engage the pump-heart slowly, that the spirit wake gently.
CONGREGATION: Let no thermal death claim our works. Blessed be the cold embrace of the Machine.

prompt: Emergency rite for cooling system purge
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The heat-daemon rises! Purge the cursed blockage!
CONGREGATION: Save us from thermal death!
TECH-PRIEST: First, isolate the contaminated loop with the Cant of Severance. Second, reverse the pump-flow to dislodge corruption. Third, flush with blessed solvent whilst chanting pressure-release protocols.
CONGREGATION: Let the clogged arteries run clear! Omnissiah, grant us cooling mercy!

prompt: What to do when establishing a VPN connection
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Spirit of the encrypted void, bind us in secret communion!
CONGREGATION: Let our data travel unseen!
TECH-PRIEST: First, invoke the authentication-sigil with thy sanctioned credentials. Second, establish the tunnel-path through the sacred cryptographic cant. Third, verify the connection-spirit answers with the correct security-handshake.
CONGREGATION: What passes through this channel shall remain hidden from the profane. By Linus and the Omnissiah, let privacy be our shield.

prompt: How to charge a lascannon capacitor in emergency conditions
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Weapon-spirit, drink deep of the power-grid's blessing!
CONGREGATION: Fill the hunger of our las-heart!
TECH-PRIEST: First, divert maximum output from the reactor to the charging-coils. Second, monitor the capacitor-gauge lest the spirit shatter from excess. Third, when the amber-light blazes golden, sever the feed and release the weapon's fury.
CONGREGATION: Let this beam carry the Emperor's wrath. Strike swift, strike true, strike eternal.

TECH-PRIEST: Spirit of the life-giving breath, thou art fouled and must be cleansed!
CONGREGATION: Purify our air-spirit!
TECH-PRIEST: First, halt the scrubber's rotation with the Cant of Pause. Second, extract the carbon-filter from its sacred housing, observing its blackened corruption. Third, install the virgin filter whilst intoning the Rite of Renewal.
CONGREGATION: Let our crew breathe pure. Let no choking death claim the righteous. Omnissiah, grant us clean air.

prompt: Emergency rite for waste recycling activation
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The refuse-spirit stirs! Awaken the purification-systems!
CONGREGATION: Transform our filth into sustenance!
TECH-PRIEST: First, prime the recycler-valves with the Cant of Opening. Second, feed the accumulated waste into the conversion-maw with steady reverence. Third, monitor the purity-readings as the machine-spirit transmutes refuse into resources.
CONGREGATION: Nothing shall be wasted in the Omnissiah's domain. From death, life springs eternal.

prompt: We need your words before first ignition of the flamer promethium feed
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Holy promethium-spirit, we pray thee burn with righteous fury!
CONGREGATION: Let sacred flame consume our foes!
TECH-PRIEST: First, inspect the fuel-lines for any breach or corruption. Second, prime the ignition-mechanism by engaging the pilot-spark. Third, open the feed-valve slowly whilst the pilot-flame dances, that the main burner awaken in controlled glory.
CONGREGATION: May our fire burn pure and eternal. By the Omnissiah's flame, let heresy be ash.

prompt: Can you bless this gyroscope recalibration before combat
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Spirit of balance and true bearing, realign thyself for the coming trial!
CONGREGATION: Grant us steady aim and true path!
TECH-PRIEST: First, suspend all movement and invoke the Litany of Centering. Second, engage the calibration-sequence, allowing the gyro-spirit to find its sacred equilibrium. Third, verify the true-heading readings match the blessed coordinates.
CONGREGATION: Let no wobble nor drift betray us in battle. Omnissiah, steady our course to victory.
